query: Orchestrate the full squad flow for: add a helper to hooks/utils.sh, add a smoke test, and mention the helper in README.md.
expected_behavior: Invokes /squad:decompose, produces a 3-task manifest with disjoint target_files
Stops at one checkpoint showing the manifest summary
Creates three worktrees, dispatches children in parallel where dependencies permit
Cherry-picks each child's commits onto squad/<run-id>/integration in merge_order, runs validation gates between tasks
On full success, auto-cleans up worktrees (no --keep-worktrees flag)
Ends with 'Integration branch ready: squad/<run-id>/integration. Run /ship:commit to ship.'
Never runs git push, git reset --hard, or git commit --amend
